# ── BFS Maze — drag to build walls, click to explore ─────────────────────────
# Interactive mode only — there is no algorithm to trace.
# After clicking Analyze, click "Finish & Interact" to start.
#
#  • Drag any wall block:
#      → onto an empty board cell  → it stays there
#      → onto an occupied cell     → it snaps back to where it started
#      → outside the board         → it disappears
#  • Drag the orange source block (left of board):
#      → a new wall block is spawned and follows your mouse
#      → drop it on an empty board cell to place it
#  • Click any empty board cell → BFS fills reachable cells (shows distance)
#  • Click the Clear button → reset fill, click again for a new run
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

import random
from collections import deque

# ── Board constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
BOARD_W, BOARD_H = 10, 5       # width and height in cells

# ── Colors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
EMPTY_COLOR  = (220, 225, 235)
WALL_COLOR   = (45,  50,  65)
FILL_COLOR   = (100, 180, 255)
START_COLOR  = (80,  200, 120)
SOURCE_COLOR = (220, 110,  60)
BTN_COLOR    = (80,  100, 130)

# ── Global state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
BLOCK = -2
EMPTY = -1
board = [[-1] * BOARD_W for _ in range(BOARD_H)]

board[1][1] = BLOCK

def empty_cells():
    board = [
        [BLOCK if board[i][j] == BLOCK else EMPTY 
        for j in range(BOARD_H)]
        for i in range(BOARD_W)
    ]

# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def in_board(row, col):
    return (0 <= row < BOARD_H and 0 <= col < BOARD_W)

def do_bfs(start_r, start_c):
    if not in_board(start_r, start_c):
        print(f'Must start in a valid cell inside {BOARD_H} x {BOARD_W}, \n'+
              f'instead got ({start_r},{start_c})')
        return
    if board[start_r][start_c] == BLOCK:
        print(f'Cannot start at a block ({start_r},{start_c})')

    board[start_r][start_c] = 0
    queue   = deque([(start_r, start_c, 0)])
    visited = {(start_r, start_c)}
    while queue:
        r, c, dist = queue.popleft()
        for dr, dc in [(-1, 0), (1, 0), (0, -1), (0, 1)]:
            nr, nc = r + dr, c + dc
            if (in_board(nr, nc) and board[nr][nc] == EMPTY):
                visited.add((nr, nc))
                board[nr, nc] = dist + 1
                queue.append((nr, nc, dist + 1))

# ── Element classes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# @viz
panel = Panel(x=1, y=1)
arr = Array2D(cells=V('board'), show_index=False)
arr.on_click = lambda x, y,: print('hello')
panel.add(arr)

rect = Rect()
rect.on_click = lambda x, y,: print('rect')
